creator: ru@sunbay.com
text:
On Tue, Aug 22, 2000 at 10:11:18AM -0400, rwatson@freebsd.org wrote:
> 
> fledge:~> passwd
> realm WATSON.ORG
> Old password for robert:
> New Password for robert:
> Verifying password - New Password for robert:
> passwd in free(): warning: junk pointer, too high to make sense.
> kpasswd: Couldn't access ticket file  attempting to change password.
> Password NOT changed.
> 
Compiling passwd with -g and then running it with MALLOC_OPTIONS=A
may be of some help here.
